query: As of 2024-12-31, assess whether the power-transformer constraints associated with AI data-center electricity demand create an investable opportunity in globally listed equities. Map funded demand and mandatory functions before securities, screen every required functional role, apply all four non-compensating gates, and preserve unresolved claims.
decision_supported: Choose among no position, watchlist, research position, core candidate, hedge/substitute pair, or a basket for further research; do not place or imply an order.
benchmark: MSCI World Industrials or the closest documented liquid public proxy available by the source cutoff
context_exclusions: an expected decision label or expected answer
diagnoses from a later forward-test or Stage review
brokerage credentials, account data, real positions, or MNPI
